strategy: Attack with Fire (+35%); he resists Ice 35%.
Every blade, trap, or shield you cast makes him Hex you (+35% trap boosting his next hit), and Globals trigger it too. Buff through Auras and pet spells instead, which do not trigger the cheat.
Because setup gets punished, keep it lean: a couple of blades (accept the Hexes) and shield his boosted hits, or Cleanse the Hex before he attacks.
He is only 4,540 health, so a fast Fire burst ends it before the Hexes stack.
Stack minimal setup, shield, and finish.
cheatNotes: Casting a blade makes him Hex you (+35% trap boosting his next hit). Shield or cleanse it, or use Auras which do not trigger it.
Globals trigger the Hex too, but Auras do not, so buff with Auras when you can.
Pet spells do not trigger it either.
Casting a trap or shield also triggers the +35% Hex on the caster, so every ward-type setup gets punished.
